Even if you subscripe and pay a bunch for premium, this app is incredibly underwhelming. So sad, it used to be so much better *without* paying. Skip this one. Facebook dating is way better and you don't have to pay for the features Bumble makes you pay for.

I was kicked off the app for being trans with ZERO misconduct. I have sent 4 requests for a review but they dont respond. Its unfortunate they enable this kind of discrimination and refuse to respond to issues. People in their company seem to respond to reviews but never support requests. Tell me why I was kicked off or reinstate my account. Stunning level of unprofessionalism for the bare minimum which would make them a viable company.
Never works

Terrible. Doesn't deserve a star. Just a money grabber. No likes, no matches, and no messages from those who do match with you. Not enough opportunities or swipes available. You can't get anywhere. Not worth a single penny or a second of anyone's time.

They lie to you, they will hide things behind a paywall and if you do pay, the things they hid weren't there. They are just another predatory app that doesn't care about its users or what it was supposed to be used for. Update. Not only the above. But now I am being charged 5.99 daily. I already removed my subscription from the play store, I removed my payment method from bumble. And yet still, somehow, they keep taking. DON'T USE THIS APP

Pointless app. Women match you all day, then are too shy to speak. They're really starting to push ads aggressively trying to sell you on exorbitant premium features. Then their response to my review is just more marketing.... telling me to buy their premium "compliments" feature to send a first message..... It still doesn't work that way.
I uninstalled this app and now keep getting ads about using the app to date to "fight the patriarchy". Is that really supposed to make me want to use it again? How embarrassing...

Re-downloaded just to see, so yeah, honest review of bumble is you'll never match or talk to a real person, they'll constantly bombard you with "check out your bee line they like you", just to be hit with a "for only 14 a week you can see your bee line" 6 likes per day and none will ever been picked up on, it's a waste of time through and through. Unless you want one of the 50 paid tiers, pay to rewind/to super like/to compliment/to talk to a woman at all.

Pretty poor, get a few matches when you first join but then none. Profile clearly not being shown to other users - I got matches when I left and rejoined. Also distance doesn't take into account rivers/bridges so shown profiles with long journey times - unless you happen to own a helicopter! In response to developer comments, my profile isn't the problem - get plenty of matches on other apps!

The paid/premium plan is useless. You can only send 5 Superswipes per week and just one complement. This should be increased to 25 and 10, at the minimum. Both men and women should be able to initiate a conversation based on who matches first. Also, your attempt at Speed Dating is a major mess.
Women message first would be great if ever women who messaged wasn't an escort a bot or an OF chick. Doesn't seem to be anything legit on here

Makes you loose your time (this a bot or an IA which rejects it...). Definitely or you need to pay a professional photographer to use this application. After finally done, I spent more than 100 € in premium access and "boosters" in 1 month : did not receive 1 single "like". This is a myth and a fraud.....

This app does not like guys to message first. It's actually a scam, they want you to subscribe for a chance to talk. Even then, this app doesn't even let you, nor does it want you to match with people. This team has failed to deliver a good dating app for both sides. Plus, you can't adjust the age to where you're meeting people within you're range. This is not a number one dating app, I mean at least in POF, you can send a message first. Garbage app, I'd give it a 0 stars if possible.

Zero concerns about user safety, it's all on auto pilot with no customer support. Their new compliment feature opens women up to the typical hate and abuse they might get online. Absolutely no matches worth seeing, please save your money and delete this app.

! Be very cautious about buying any premium package or spending anything in this app. ! There are better alternatives if you are after a relationship. This app is misleading and increases your profile visibility etc when you don't have premium to encourage you to buy it, and then quickly matches, likes, etc evaporate if you do have premium. This app is for making money. As a female, you can expect an inundation of likes from sub-par accounts, while as a male it may likely be the opposite.
